file_purpose: Implementation-ready Eric Bellinger album/project metadata with tracklists, featured artists, and credit placeholders for website integration.
data_quality_note: This is a best-effort public-source dataset. Albums/projects with tracklist_status='verified_best_effort' have tracklists populated from public sources. Albums/projects marked 'needs_tracklist_resolution' should be filled by Hermes using Apple/iTunes lookup, MusicBrainz, Spotify, Amazon Music, or official DSP metadata before production launch.

sources.note: Per-track source strings are embedded on each tracklist. Exact source URLs are included in source_notes where used.
